text:
Once upon a time there was a little girl who could talk to animals.

She went walking one day and began to listen. She listened

for all sorts of animals. She could talk

to squirrels,

for instance,

and rabbits.

After all,

those are nature's little creatures!

She'd sit

at a

little old tree

and listen

to the squirrels.
